verbatim_text: Why? After all, I mean, during, at training time, when we are given a lot of data, we know what to do about it, right? We just run rating descent on the model. How come that at test time, when we call it a different word, it's called context, maybe you don't know what to do about it. Well, that's because, at least in the old days, in the old rules of machine learning, you cannot change the model ways at test time anymore, right? So people come up with all kinds of workarounds so we can use this data without changing the model ways. And, you know, the most well known is called self-attention, which is the main component in transformers.
